name: Portable Ops
short_description: In POPS, every bullet fired pushes you further into the chaos of war. The story-driven campaign throws you into the boots of an elite operative. Fight through a series of intense missions, face overwhelming odds, unexpected betrayals, and brutal firefights where only the strongest survive.
detailed_description:
Single Player Campaign / Multiplayer (Online and Offline or LAN)

SINGLE PLAYER CAMPAIGN

6 Story Missions – Battle across the globe, from Duhok to Washington D.C., the heart of Africa to the Netherlands, and beyond.

  • Mission-Based Progression: Fight through a tightly crafted narrative with no distractions—just action, choices, and survival in high-intensity shootouts and equipment management.

  • Cinematic Storytelling: Fully voiced characters, in-game cutscenes, and immersive world-building pull you deeper into the conflict.

OUTFIT YOUR MERCENARY

Customize your player model: Select the character body, customize the uniform or outfits. Level up your player to unlock more uniforms and character body styles.

Customize your weapons

Setup your default weapons with suppressors, flip stocks, sites and grips. Unlock additional customization paintjobs/skins and items as you earn money and your player gains levels.

MULTIPLAYER (Online and Offline or LAN)

Beyond the Campaign: Multiplayer & Zombie Hunt

MAPS (30+)

  • Deathmatch, Team Deathmatch, Take and Hold, Kill Confirmed, Capture the Flag, Defend the Bridge, Zombie Hunt, VIP Extract, Co-op Zone (Large multi-objective competitve team map - beta)

Portable Ops takes players across intense battlegrounds worldwide, from the war-torn streets of Duhok, Iraq, and the industrial depths of a Russian facility, to the high-stakes combat zones of a French prison and a hydroelectric dam in the Netherlands. Whether engaging in tactical firefights on a New Jersey rooftop, navigating the dense Brazilian jungle, or battling in the neon-lit future of Japan 2099, every map offers unique challenges and strategic opportunities in this adrenaline-fueled FPS.

  • 32v32 Tactical Multiplayer: Battle in massive online conflicts with strategic teamwork and intense firefights.

  • Zombie Hunt Co-op Mode: Survive relentless waves of the undead, scavenging for weapons and working together to stay alive.

GUNS: Lots of Guns

Primary Weapons:

  • M4 (Iron sight, holo-sight, laser sight, suppressor) – A staple in FPS games for its balance of accuracy and power.

  • AK-47 – Iconic, powerful, and widely used across FPS titles.

  • M-16 – Burst-fire control makes it a tactical favorite.

  • FAMAS – Popular for its high rate of fire and precision.

  • MP5 (Standard & Suppressor) – A top-tier SMG with smooth handling.

  • SPAS-12 Shotgun – One of the most recognizable and powerful shotguns.

  • Pump-Action Shotgun – Reliable and devastating up close.

  • IWI Auto-Shotgun – Perfect for fast-paced, close-quarters combat.

  • M-249 SAW – Heavy suppression weapon, great for sustained fire.

  • Mac-11 (Standard & Suppressor) – A fast-firing, compact SMG.

Sniper Rifles:

  • SVD Dragunov – A classic semi-automatic sniper.

  • M-14 Sniper – Precision rifle with a tactical edge.

  • VSS Sniper (Single & Automatic Fire) – Unique, suppressed sniper rifle with versatile fire modes.

  • .357 American Sniper – High-caliber bolt-action rifle for long-range kills.

Secondary Weapons:

  • Colt 1911 Pistol – A legendary sidearm.

  • Beretta 9mm – Well-rounded and reliable.

  • SOCOM – Tactical pistol with elite military use.

  • Sig Sauer .45 – A powerful semi-auto handgun.

Melee & Special Weapons:

  • Bowie Knife – Classic combat blade for silent takedowns.

  • Katana Sword – A high-style, deadly melee option.

  • Punch / Kick / CQC – Hand-to-hand combat for brutal takedowns.

  • American Thompson – A historic SMG with nostalgic appeal.

  • Toy Foam Dart Repeater – A fun, gimmick weapon for lighthearted combat.

YOU'RE INVITED!

Join our Discord and help influence the game

Join our Discord where you are encourge you to leave feedback and feature requests and participate in scheduled group gaming sessions.

"My brother and I are actively developing and improving our game, aiming to deliver a high-quality experience for military game enthusiasts. As our skills grow, we’ll continue refining the game, implementing new features, and listening to player feedback. We’d love for you to join us on this journey—your support and input mean a lot. Hope you enjoy the game!"

-Kevin & Sean, the Devs
